name: ck
description: Cavekit — spec-driven AI development with an autonomous execution loop. Four-command main cycle (sketch → map → make → check), plus /ck:ship one-shot, /ck:review audits, /ck:revise kit amendments, /ck:status progress, /ck:design visual system, /ck:research evidence, /ck:init + /ck:config + /ck:resume + /ck:help. Per-task token budgets, stop-hook state machine, model-tier routing, auto-revision from test failures, tool-result caching, Codex peer review, Karpathy behavioural guardrails, caveman token compression, knowledge-graph integration, and design-system enforcement.
